pg128-p1-s2: Giving, rather than getting, will become the guiding principle.
pg128-p1: little. Giving, rather than getting, will become the guiding principle.
pg128-p2-s1: Assume on the other hand that father has, at the outset, a stirring spiritual experience.
pg128-p2-s2:
Overnight, as it were, he is a
different man.
pg128-p2-s4: He is unable to focus on anything else.
pg128-p2-s5:
As soon as his sobriety begins
to be taken as a matter of course, the family may look at their strange new dad with apprehension, then with irritation.
pg128-p2-s6: There is talk about spiritual matters morning, noon and night.
pg128-p2-s7:
He may demand that the family find God in a hurry, or

pg128-p2:
Assume on the other hand that father has, at the outset, a stirring spiritual experience. Overnight, as it were, he is a
different man. He becomes a religious enthusiast. He is unable to focus on anything else. As soon as his sobriety begins
to be taken as a matter of course, the family may look at their strange new dad with apprehension, then with irritation. There is talk about spiritual matters morning, noon and night. He may demand that the family find God in a hurry, or
exhibit amazing indifference to them and say he is above worldly considerations. He may tell mother, who has been
religious all her life, that she doesn't know what it's all about, and that she had better get his brand of spirituality
while there is yet time.
pg128-p3-s1: When father takes this tack, the family may react unfavorably.
pg128-p3-s2:
They may be jealous of a God who has stolen dad's
affections.
pg128-p3-s3:
While grateful that he drinks no more, they may not like the idea that God has accomplished the miracle
where they failed.
pg128-p3-s4: They often forget father was beyond human aid.
pg128-p3-s5:
They may not see why their love and devotion did not
straighten him out.
pg128-p3-s6: Dad is not so spiritual after all, they say.
pg128-p3-s7:
If he means to right his past wrongs, why all this
concern for everyone in the world but his family?
pg128-p3-s8: What about his talk that God will take care of them?
pg128-p3-s9:
They suspect
father is a bit balmy!
pg128-p3:
When father takes this tack, the family may react unfavorably. They may be jealous of a God who has stolen dad's
affections. While grateful that he drinks no more, they may not like the idea that God has accomplished the miracle
where they failed. They often forget father was beyond human aid. They may not see why their love and devotion did not
straighten him out. Dad is not so spiritual after all, they say. If he means to right his past wrongs, why all this
concern for everyone in the world but his family? What about his talk that God will take care of them? They suspect
father is a bit balmy!
pg128-p4-s1: He is not so unbalanced as they might think.
pg128-p4-s2: Many of us have experienced dad's elation.
pg128-p4-s3:
We have indulged in spiritual
intoxication.
pg128-p4-s4: Like a gaunt prospector, belt drawn in over the last ounce of food, our pick struck gold.
pg128-p4-s5:
Joy at our
release from a lifetime of
pg128-p4:

intoxication. Like a gaunt prospector, belt drawn in over the last ounce of food, our pick struck gold. Joy at our
